expected.notes: Compensation matches between I-983 and employment letter so salary_mismatch should not fire despite structural similarity to positive cases.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'salary_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.compensation mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
